title.en: CONVERSION OF CHEMICAL ELEMENTS; RADIOACTIVE SOURCES (applications of radiation in general G21H5/00; handling particles, e.g. neutrons, or electromagnetic radiation not otherwise provided for G21K)

Arrangements for converting chemical elements by electromagnetic radiation, corpuscular radiation or particle bombardment, e.g. producing radioactive isotopes (separation of different isotopes of the same element B01D59/00)
{Isotope delivery systems (use of radioisotopes as tracers G21H5/02)}
{Recovery of specific isotopes from irradiated targets}
in nuclear reactors (by thermonuclear reactions G21B; conversion of nuclear fuel G21C)
outside nuclear reactors or particle accelerators

Radioactive sources (producing neutrons or other subatomic particles, X- or gamma rays, in fusion reactors G21B, in nuclear reactors G21C, by cosmic radiation G21H7/00, in accelerators H05H; X-ray tubes H01J35/00; gamma masers H01S4/00)
Radioactive sources other than neutron sources (radioactive dressings A61N5/1029)
Alleged conversion of chemical elements by chemical reaction
Conversion of chemical elements not provided for in other groups of this subclass
